title: Add registration verification test for inventory dispatch
description: No test currently asserts the count or names of registered backends. A typo in an inventory::submit\! name field (e.g. 'aws_sm' instead of 'aws-sm') compiles successfully but causes from_uri to silently return InvalidUri for that backend. Add a test that iterates inventory::iter::<BackendRegistration>() and asserts that specific expected backend names are present when their features are enabled.
